title: penstemon newberryi subsp. berryi
intro: Penstemon newberryi subsp. berryi, also known as Newberry's beardtongue, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the penstemon family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues and as an expectorant to help relieve congestion. The health benefits of Newberry's beardtongue include its ability to alleviate coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
